policy_name: Aetna Reimbursement Handling Policy - Wells Household

validation_rules.requirement: Claims filed under Aetna claim ID ANJ-*
validation_rules.action: Track in this ledger under Insurance Reimbursements Receivable until paid
validation_rules.notes: Partial coverage ~40% per Aetna case handler confirmation (Freshdesk 70010)

validation_rules.requirement: Montclair Pharmacy receipts with Rx numbers
validation_rules.notes: Consolidated pharmacy claims (MPH-CYC-*) allowed once per year

validation_rules.requirement: Any Freshdesk ticket flipping PENDING to PAID or vice versa
validation_rules.action: Update both this ledger and the Airtable IVF cost tracker
validation_rules.notes: Do not rely on the tracker alone; portal is authoritative when it disagrees

validation_rules.requirement: Clinic charges landing after cycle close
validation_rules.action: File a separate reimbursement claim; do NOT roll into a closed cycle invoice
validation_rules.notes: See NNJFC-C2-INV2-LATE handling as canonical example

validation_rules.requirement: Any medical charge >= $300 not yet posted
validation_rules.action: Pause for Danny confirmation before scheduling payment

context: Household medical-expense ledger reimbursement rules. This is a joint household ledger for Danny and Priya Wells only.
